content:
"""
    return os.path.join(
        get_librelane_root(),
        "scripts",
    )


def get_opdks_rev() -> str:
    """
    Gets the Open_PDKs revision confirmed compatible with this version of LibreLane.
    """
    return (
        open(os.path.join(get_librelane_root(), "open_pdks_rev"), encoding="utf8")
        .read()
        .strip()
    )

" 2>/dev/null
